<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>Nordkyc — Past · Present · Future</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: #faf9f5; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }
    #__bundler_loading { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; font: 13px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: #666; background: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); z-index: 10000; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #faf9f5; z-index: 9999; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    #__bundler_placeholder { color: #999; font-size: 14px; }
  </style>
  <noscript>
    <style>#__bundler_loading { display: none; }</style>
    <div style="position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;font:13px/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;color:#999;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);z-index:10000;">
      This page requires JavaScript to display.
    </div>
  </noscript>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="__bundler_thumbnail">
  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" style="width:100%;height:100%">
    <rect width="200" height="200" fill="#F7F5F2"></rect>
    <g transform="translate(40,40)" shape-rendering="crispEdges">
      <rect x="18" y="18" width="84" height="84" fill="#8854D0"></rect>
      <rect x="0" y="36" width="18" height="18" fill="#8854D0"></rect>
      <rect x="102" y="54" width="18" height="18" fill="#8854D0"></rect>
      <rect x="36" y="0" width="18" height="18" fill="#8854D0"></rect>
      <rect x="36" y="102" width="18" height="18" fill="#8854D0"></rect>
      <rect x="66" y="102" width="18" height="18" fill="#8854D0"></rect>
      <rect x="33" y="34" width="9" height="22" fill="#0F0F12"></rect>
      <rect x="78" y="34" width="9" height="22" fill="#0F0F12"></rect>
    </g>
  </svg>
</div>
  <div id="__bundler_loading">Unpacking...</div>

  <script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }

  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
  }, true);

  try {
    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
      return;
    }

    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);

    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');

    const blobUrls = {};
    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
      const entry = manifest[uuid];
      try {
        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);

        let finalBytes = bytes;
        if (entry.compressed) {
          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
            writer.write(bytes);
            writer.close();
            const chunks = [];
            let totalLen = 0;
            while (true) {
              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
              if (done) break;
              chunks.push(value);
              totalLen += value.length;
            }
            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
            let offset = 0;
            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
          } else {
            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
          }
        }

        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([], { type: entry.mime }));
      }
    }));

    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
    const resourceMap = {};
    for (const entry of extResources) {
      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
    }

    setStatus('Rendering...');
    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);

    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');

    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
      ';</' + 'script>';
    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
    if (headOpen) {
      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
    }

    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
    for (const old of dead) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
      s.textContent = old.textContent;
      // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags
      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
        const r = await fetch(s.src);
        s.textContent = await r.text();
        s.removeAttribute('src');
      }
      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
      old.replaceWith(s);
      if (p) await p;
    }
    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
  }
});

  </script>

  <script type="__bundler/manifest">
{"105ed75d-e3c1-4a37-8b85-468eaf4ecc46":{"mime":"image/png","compressed":false,"data":""},"2bfb2f12-9baa-49cf-a376-eeb257d5fdac":{"mime":"image/png","compressed":false,"data":""},"c5c0d4fb-f763-4eef-bf8a-d371a3abcb94":{"mime":"image/png","compressed":false,"data":""},"08cdf72a-cbde-4eee-8f9b-defc2364450a":{"mime":"image/png","compressed":false,"data":""},"61544870-5a6a-45a0-8a8b-75e0eae4e7de":{"mime":"image/png","compressed":false,"data":""},"ddc223d3-1539-4c26-bffa-3a84e2a4bb6a":{"mime":"image/png","compressed":false,"data":""},"a842835a-1ff4-48f4-ab58-549d094abb13":{"mime":"image/png","compressed":false,"data":""},"9b0bcf51-5e5a-48ae-a692-6153b7a33dc1":{"mime":"text/javascript","compressed":true,"data":""},"78b52d12-3f7b-4510-a085-bd397a8602ed":{"mime":"font/ttf","compressed":true,"data":""},"395b83a0-318f-4c37-958b-64eae9dc10ac":{"mime":"font/ttf","compressed":true,"data":""},"886680fa-d021-4621-b1cc-02550eb4161d":{"mime":"font/ttf","compressed":true,"data":""},"289665d6-a223-45c5-bb0d-a8b6cc6be42c":{"mime":"font/ttf","compressed":true,"data":""}}
  </script>

  <script type="__bundler/ext_resources">
[]
  </script>

  <script type="__bundler/template">
"<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\"><head>\n<meta charset=\"utf-8\">\n<title>Nordkyc — Past · Present · Future<\u002Ftitle>\n<style>\n  /* ---------- Fonts ---------- */\n  @font-face { font-family: \"Causten\"; src: url(\"78b52d12-3f7b-4510-a085-bd397a8602ed\") format(\"truetype\"); font-weight: 400; font-display: swap; }\n  @font-face { font-family: \"Causten\"; src: url(\"395b83a0-318f-4c37-958b-64eae9dc10ac\")  format(\"truetype\"); font-weight: 500; font-display: swap; }\n  @font-face { font-family: \"Causten\"; src: url(\"886680fa-d021-4621-b1cc-02550eb4161d\")format(\"truetype\"); font-weight: 600; font-display: swap; }\n  @font-face { font-family: \"Causten\"; src: url(\"289665d6-a223-45c5-bb0d-a8b6cc6be42c\")    format(\"truetype\"); font-weight: 700; font-display: swap; }\n\n  /* ---------- Tokens ---------- */\n  :root {\n    --violet:        #8854d0;\n    --violet-700:    #6E3FB0;\n    --violet-500:    #8854d0;\n    --violet-300:    #C9B5E8;\n    --violet-100:    #EDE4FA;\n    --sand:          #E8DCC9;\n    --sand-light:    #F4EDDF;\n    --aubergine:     #1F1A2C;\n    --paper:         #F7F5F2;\n    --ink:           #1d1d20;\n    --ink-soft:      #6a6a72;\n    --ink-mute:      #9a9aa1;\n    --hairline:      #E2DACD;\n    --grid:          rgba(31, 26, 44, 0.06);\n\n    --ease:          cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1);\n    --ease-pop:      cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);\n  }\n\n  html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; background: #000; }\n  body { font-family: \"Causten\", \"Inter\", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--ink); }\n\n  /* ---------- Slide ---------- */\n  .slide {\n    background: var(--paper);\n    color: var(--ink);\n    overflow: hidden;\n    position: relative;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    user-select: none;\n  }\n\n  /* ==========================================================\n     INTRO LAYER  — phase 0\n     ========================================================== */\n  .intro {\n    position: absolute; inset: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 60px;\n    z-index: 2;\n  }\n  .slide[data-phase=\"0\"] .intro { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; pointer-events: auto; }\n  .slide:not([data-phase=\"0\"]) .intro { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none; }\n\n  .intro-stack {\n    position: relative;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 48px;\n  }\n\n  /* Logo block — wordmark + mascot peek */\n  .intro-logo-wrap {\n    position: relative;\n    padding: 0;\n    z-index: 2;\n  }\n  /* Wordmark image — sits ABOVE the mascot in z-stack so the mascot's body is\n     hidden behind it; only the head/antenna peeks above its top edge. */\n  .intro-logo-wrap img.wordmark {\n    height: 220px; width: auto; display: block;\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 2;\n  }\n\n  /* Mascot — a small character whose HEAD peeks out from the c letter.\n     The mascot sits BEHIND the c (anchor extends from above the wordmark\n     down to the c's top edge). Most of the head is visible above the c;\n     the body is clipped at the c top so it looks like the mascot is hiding\n     inside / behind the letter. */\n  .intro-mascot-anchor {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: -60px;             /* 60px above wordmark top edge */\n    left: 91%;              /* horizontally over the c's apex */\n    transform: translateX(-50%);\n    width: 110px;\n    height: 103px;          /* 60 above + 43 into wordmark (to c top) */\n    overflow: hidden;       /* clip mascot's body below the c top */\n    pointer-events: none;\n    z-index: 1;\n  }\n  .intro-mascot {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0; left: 0;\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 140px;          /* taller than anchor → body is clipped */\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateY(103px);  /* initial: fully hidden behind c */\n  }\n  .intro-mascot svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; }\n\n  /* Past · Present · Future tagline */\n  .intro-tagline {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 24px;\n    align-items: baseline;\n    font-size: 60px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n  }\n  .intro-tagline .word {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateY(10px);\n  }\n  .intro-tagline .word.sep { color: var(--violet); font-weight: 400; }\n  .intro-tagline .word.future { color: var(--violet); font-weight: 600; }\n\n  /* The Nordkyc logo (wordmark) */\n  .intro-logo-wrap {\n    opacity: 0;\n  }\n\n  /* (intro hint removed — keep slide visually clean. Speaker navigates with click / space / arrow keys.) */\n\n  /* ==========================================================\n     TIMELINE LAYER  — phases 1..9\n     ========================================================== */\n  .tl-layer {\n    position: absolute; inset: 0;\n    padding: 70px 100px 60px;\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-rows: auto auto auto 1fr;\n    row-gap: 28px;\n    opacity: 0;\n    visibility: hidden;\n    pointer-events: none;\n    z-index: 1;\n  }\n  .slide:not([data-phase=\"0\"]) .tl-layer {\n    opacity: 1;\n    visibility: visible;\n    pointer-events: auto;\n  }\n\n  /* ----- Header ----- */\n  .tl-header {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    gap: 40px;\n  }\n  .tl-wordmark {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 20px;\n  }\n  .tl-wordmark .tl-icon { height: 64px; width: 64px; border-radius: 14px; }\n  .tl-wordmark .tl-wm   { height: 44px; width: auto; }\n  .tl-eyebrow {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 14px;\n    font-size: 26px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n    letter-spacing: 0.01em;\n  }\n  /* Past · Present · Future eyebrow word highlighting per phase */\n  .tl-eyebrow .word-past,\n  .tl-eyebrow .word-present,\n  .tl-eyebrow .word-future {\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n    transition: color 0.4s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .slide.eb-past    .tl-eyebrow .word-past,\n  .slide.eb-present .tl-eyebrow .word-present,\n  .slide.eb-future  .tl-eyebrow .word-future {\n    color: var(--violet);\n    font-weight: 700;\n  }\n  .tl-eyebrow .sep { color: var(--violet); font-weight: 600; }\n\n  /* ----- KPI strip ----- */\n  .tl-kpis {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, auto);\n    justify-content: end;\n    gap: 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    padding: 22px 0;\n    margin-top: -6px;\n  }\n  .kpi {\n    padding: 0 48px;\n    border-left: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 8px;\n  }\n  .kpi:first-child { border-left: 0; padding-left: 0; }\n  .kpi:last-child  { padding-right: 0; }\n  .kpi .num {\n    font-size: 56px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: -0.03em;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    line-height: 1;\n    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;\n  }\n  .kpi .num .plus { color: var(--violet); margin-left: 2px; }\n  .kpi .lbl {\n    font-size: 24px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n    line-height: 1.2;\n  }\n\n  /* ----- Chart area -----\n     Layout: top zone (plot with curve + dots + popups) over a horizontal\n     timeline line; year labels sit BELOW the line. */\n  .tl-chart {\n    position: relative;\n    min-height: 0;\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-rows: 1fr 86px;\n    row-gap: 0;\n  }\n  .tl-plot {\n    position: relative;\n    min-height: 0;\n    border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(--hairline);\n  }\n  .tl-curve {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 0;\n    width: 100%; height: 100%;\n    overflow: visible;\n  }\n  .tl-curve .curve-bg {\n    fill: rgba(31,26,44,0.035);\n    stroke: rgba(31,26,44,0.12);\n    stroke-width: 1.5;\n    vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke;\n  }\n  .tl-curve .curve-fg-fill { fill: url(#curveGrad); }\n  .tl-curve .curve-fg-stroke {\n    fill: none;\n    stroke: var(--violet);\n    stroke-width: 3;\n    vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke;\n    stroke-linejoin: round;\n    stroke-linecap: round;\n  }\n  .reveal-rect {\n    transition: width 0.9s var(--ease);\n  }\n\n  /* Year labels strip (below the timeline line) */\n  .tl-years {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);\n    align-items: start;\n    padding-top: 20px;\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n  .tl-years span {\n    padding-left: 16px;\n    font-size: 26px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n    letter-spacing: 0.02em;\n    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;\n    border-left: 1px solid var(--grid);\n  }\n  .tl-years span:first-child { border-left: 0; padding-left: 0; }\n\n  /* ----- Milestones -----\n     Each .ms dot sits ON THE CURVE at its (x, y) position. Popup floats\n     above the dot, with a short connector. For dots near the top (high\n     KYC values), .flip-down moves the popup BELOW the dot instead so it\n     doesn't overflow the chart. */\n  .milestones {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0; right: 0;\n    top: 0; bottom: 0;\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n  .ms {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: calc(var(--x, 0) * 1%);\n    top:  calc(var(--y, 100) * 1%);\n    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);   /* center dot on the (x, y) point */\n    width: 22px;\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n  .ms .dot {\n    width: 22px; height: 22px;\n    background: var(--paper);\n    border: 3px solid var(--hairline);\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    transition: all 0.4s var(--ease);\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 2;\n  }\n  .ms .stem {\n    /* Short connector from dot to popup */\n    width: 1.5px;\n    background: var(--violet);\n    height: 0;\n    transition: height 0.5s var(--ease);\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 50%;\n    bottom: 24px;             /* starts just above the dot */\n    transform: translateX(-50%);\n  }\n  .ms.flip-down .stem {\n    bottom: auto;\n    top: 24px;                /* starts just below the dot */\n  }\n  .ms .popup {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 50%;\n    bottom: 80px;             /* sits above the stem */\n    transform: translate(-50%, 6px) scale(0.96);\n    opacity: 0;\n    pointer-events: none;\n    transition: opacity 0.4s var(--ease), transform 0.45s var(--ease);\n    width: 320px;\n    text-align: left;\n    padding: 22px 26px;\n    background: var(--paper);\n    border: 1.5px solid var(--violet);\n    border-radius: 16px;\n    box-shadow: 0 14px 44px -14px hsl(266 83% 55% / 0.32);\n  }\n  .ms.flip-down .popup {\n    bottom: auto;\n    top: 80px;\n    transform: translate(-50%, -6px) scale(0.96);\n  }\n  .ms.flip-down.active .popup {\n    transform: translate(-50%, 0) scale(1);\n  }\n  .ms .popup .popup-month {\n    display: block;\n    font-size: 24px;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    color: var(--violet);\n    letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n  }\n  .ms .popup .popup-title {\n    display: block;\n    font-size: 30px;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    line-height: 1.15;\n    letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n    text-wrap: balance;\n  }\n  .ms .popup .popup-note {\n    display: block;\n    font-size: 22px;\n    font-weight: 400;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n    line-height: 1.35;\n    margin-top: 10px;\n  }\n\n  /* Edge-flip: when the dot is near the right edge, anchor popup to the right */\n  .ms.flip-left .popup {\n    left: auto;\n    right: -8px;\n    transform: translate(0, 6px) scale(0.96);\n  }\n  .ms.flip-left.flip-down .popup {\n    transform: translate(0, -6px) scale(0.96);\n  }\n  .ms.flip-left.active .popup {\n    transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1);\n  }\n\n  /* Done state: dot filled violet (past milestone) */\n  .ms.done .dot {\n    background: var(--violet);\n    border-color: var(--violet);\n  }\n\n  /* Active state: dot highlighted with halo, stem grows, popup fades in */\n  .ms.active .dot {\n    background: var(--violet);\n    border-color: var(--violet);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px var(--violet-100), 0 0 0 11px rgba(136,84,208,0.18);\n    transform: scale(1.15);\n  }\n  .ms.active .stem {\n    height: 50px;\n  }\n  .ms.active .popup {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: translate(-50%, 0) scale(1);\n    pointer-events: auto;\n  }\n\n  /* ----- Footer ----- */\n  .tl-footer {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    font-size: 24px;\n    color: var(--ink-mute);\n    letter-spacing: 0.01em;\n    padding-top: 14px;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n  }\n  .tl-footer .src { font-style: italic; }\n  .tl-footer .deck-meta { font-style: normal; }\n\n  /* ----- Partners & integrations strip -----\n     Sits between the header and the KPI strip in PAST mode, then slides\n     down to the bottom of the slide in PRESENT mode. Each chip is hidden\n     until its corresponding milestone phase, then fades/pops in. */\n  .tl-partners {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 28px;\n    padding: 16px 0 20px;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    min-height: 110px;\n    transition:\n      transform 0.95s var(--ease),\n      padding 0.7s var(--ease),\n      border-color 0.6s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .tl-partners .label {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 2px;\n    font-size: 16px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: var(--ink-mute);\n    letter-spacing: 0.14em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    margin-right: 8px;\n    line-height: 1.1;\n    padding-right: 28px;\n    border-right: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    transition: opacity 0.4s var(--ease), color 0.4s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .tl-partners .label small {\n    font-size: 12px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: var(--ink-mute);\n    letter-spacing: 0.18em;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n  }\n  .tl-partners .chips {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: space-around;\n    gap: 24px;\n    flex: 1;\n  }\n  .partner-chip {\n    /* Equal-width slots so logos breathe with consistent rhythm */\n    flex: 1 1 0;\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    height: 74px;\n    padding: 0 18px;\n    opacity: 0;\n    filter: grayscale(0.15);\n    transform: translateY(8px) scale(0.94);\n    transition:\n      opacity 0.55s var(--ease),\n      transform 0.65s var(--ease-pop),\n      filter 0.5s var(--ease),\n      height 0.7s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .partner-chip img {\n    height: 100%;\n    width: auto;\n    max-width: 100%;\n    display: block;\n    object-fit: contain;\n  }\n  /* Per-logo height tweaks so visual mass is balanced across the strip\n     (raw logos have very different baseline heights / padding). */\n  .partner-chip[data-partner-from=\"2\"] img { height: 84%; } /* Mäklarsamfundet */\n  .partner-chip[data-partner-from=\"4\"] img { height: 70%; } /* Vitec */\n  .partner-chip[data-partner-from=\"5\"] img { height: 72%; } /* MSpecs */\n  .partner-chip[data-partner-from=\"6\"] img { height: 96%; } /* SRF */\n  .partner-chip[data-partner-from=\"9\"] img { height: 130%; } /* Fasad */\n\n  .partner-chip.shown {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: translateY(0) scale(1);\n    filter: grayscale(0);\n  }\n  .partner-chip.is-new {\n    animation: chip-pop 0.7s var(--ease-pop);\n  }\n  @keyframes chip-pop {\n    0%   { transform: translateY(8px) scale(0.85); opacity: 0; }\n    60%  { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.08); opacity: 1; }\n    100% { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 1; }\n  }\n\n  /* In PRESENT mode, the strip slides smoothly from its grid position\n     down to the bottom of the slide. We use a transform on the same\n     element (rather than swapping to position: absolute) so the motion\n     is continuous and tweenable. The exact delta is measured at load\n     and stored in --partners-y. */\n  .tl-partners {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 5;\n    will-change: transform;\n  }\n  .slide.present-mode .tl-partners {\n    transform: translateY(var(--partners-y, 720px));\n    padding: 26px 0 0;\n    border-top-color: var(--violet-300);\n  }\n  .slide.present-mode .tl-partners .label {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateX(-8px);\n    transition: opacity 0.3s var(--ease), transform 0.5s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .slide.present-mode .partner-chip { height: 88px; }\n\n  /* ==========================================================\n     PRESENT STAGE  — phases 10..12\n     The timeline collapses, KPIs are elevated as the three bullets,\n     a card describes the leadership position, and an outro line\n     bridges into Future.\n     ========================================================== */\n  .tl-chart,\n  .present-content {\n    grid-row: 4 / 5;\n    grid-column: 1 / 2;\n  }\n  .tl-chart {\n    transition: opacity 0.5s var(--ease), transform 0.8s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .slide.present-mode .tl-chart {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateY(48px);\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n\n  .tl-kpis {\n    transition:\n      padding 0.6s var(--ease),\n      justify-content 0s,\n      border-color 0.5s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .kpi { transition: padding 0.6s var(--ease); }\n  .kpi .num, .kpi .lbl { transition: font-size 0.5s var(--ease); }\n\n  .slide.present-mode .tl-kpis {\n    justify-content: center;\n    padding: 40px 0;\n    border-top-color: var(--violet-300);\n    border-bottom-color: var(--violet-300);\n  }\n  .slide.present-mode .kpi { padding: 0 84px; }\n  .slide.present-mode .kpi .num { font-size: 88px; }\n  .slide.present-mode .kpi .lbl { font-size: 28px; }\n\n  .present-content {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    gap: 56px;\n    padding: 24px 0;\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n  /* In present mode reserve room at the bottom of the present-content\n     area so the outro text doesn't collide with the partner-logos strip\n     that has slid down to ~y=920. */\n  .slide.present-mode .present-content {\n    padding-bottom: 320px;\n  }\n  .present-card,\n  .present-outro {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateY(20px);\n    transition: opacity 0.6s var(--ease), transform 0.6s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .present-card {\n    max-width: 1180px;\n    padding: 40px 56px;\n    background: var(--paper);\n    border: 1.5px solid var(--violet);\n    border-radius: 22px;\n    box-shadow: 0 18px 50px -16px hsl(266 83% 55% / 0.30);\n  }\n  .present-card p {\n    margin: 0;\n    font-size: 38px;\n    line-height: 1.32;\n    font-weight: 400;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    text-align: center;\n    letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n    text-wrap: balance;\n  }\n  .present-card strong {\n    color: var(--violet);\n    font-weight: 700;\n  }\n  .present-outro {\n    font-size: 46px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n  }\n  .present-outro::after {\n    content: \"\";\n    display: block;\n    margin: 22px auto 0;\n    width: 64px;\n    height: 3px;\n    border-radius: 2px;\n    background: var(--violet);\n  }\n\n  .slide.present-card-shown .present-card,\n  .slide.present-outro-shown .present-card {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: translateY(0);\n  }\n  .slide.present-outro-shown .present-outro {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: translateY(0);\n  }\n\n  /* ==========================================================\n     FUTURE STAGE  — phase 13+\n     A wrapper that hosts multiple full-slide “stages” that crossfade\n     as the phase advances:\n       fs-hero       — 13: Mascot jumps in + Introducing Nordkyc 2.0\n       fs-overview   — 14: What's new (GRA, e-learning, risk-tuning,\n                            KYC flow, refreshed design system)\n       fs-gra-flow   — 15: GRA stepper + input cards\n       fs-gra-doc    — 16: finished document scrolling\n       fs-dashboard  — 17: dashboard preview\n       fs-roadmap    — 18: release roadmap (now / later this year)\n       fs-outro      — 19: closing fade\n     ========================================================== */\n  .future-layer {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 0;\n    opacity: 0;\n    visibility: hidden;\n    pointer-events: none;\n    z-index: 4;\n    background: var(--paper);\n    transition: opacity 0.7s var(--ease), visibility 0s linear 0.7s;\n    overflow: hidden;\n  }\n  .slide.future-mode .future-layer {\n    opacity: 1;\n    visibility: visible;\n    transition: opacity 0.9s var(--ease), visibility 0s linear 0s;\n  }\n\n  /* Each stage is a full-slide layer that fades in when its slide\n     class is active. Stages share the same coordinate space so they\n     can crossfade cleanly. */\n  .future-stage {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 0;\n    opacity: 0;\n    visibility: hidden;\n    transition: opacity 0.8s var(--ease), visibility 0s linear 0.8s;\n  }\n  .slide.fs-hero       .future-stage.hero,\n  .slide.fs-overview   .future-stage.overview,\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow   .future-stage.gra-flow,\n  .slide.fs-gra-doc    .future-stage.gra-doc,\n  .slide.fs-dashboard  .future-stage.dashboard,\n  .slide.fs-roadmap    .future-stage.roadmap,\n  .slide.fs-outro      .future-stage.outro {\n    opacity: 1;\n    visibility: visible;\n    transition: opacity 0.9s var(--ease), visibility 0s linear 0s;\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Stage: HERO (Introducing Nordkyc 2.0) ----------\n     Mascot jumps up from below first, then the eyebrow + headline\n     text animate in. Timing is sequenced via transition delays\n     so the text never beats the mascot to its landing pose. */\n  .future-stage.hero {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    gap: 40px;\n  }\n  .future-stage.hero::before {\n    content: \"\";\n    position: absolute;\n    width: 1400px;\n    height: 1400px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: radial-gradient(circle, hsl(266 83% 65% / 0.20) 0%, transparent 60%);\n    z-index: 0;\n    opacity: 0;\n    transition: opacity 1.2s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .slide.fs-hero .future-stage.hero::before { opacity: 1; }\n\n  .hero-mascot {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 1;\n    width: 220px;\n    height: 220px;\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateY(900px) scale(0.6);\n  }\n  .hero-mascot svg {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 100%;\n    display: block;\n  }\n  @keyframes hero-mascot-jump {\n    0%   { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(900px) scale(0.6); }\n    55%  { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-28px) scale(1.06); }\n    72%  {              transform: translateY(8px) scale(0.97);  }\n    86%  {              transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.01); }\n    100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0)    scale(1);     }\n  }\n  @keyframes hero-mascot-bob {\n    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0)    scale(1); }\n    50%      { transform: translateY(-8px) scale(1); }\n  }\n  .slide.fs-hero .hero-mascot {\n    animation:\n      hero-mascot-jump 1.0s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) forwards,\n      hero-mascot-bob  2.6s ease-in-out 1.1s infinite;\n  }\n\n  .future-eyebrow {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 1;\n    font-size: 28px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: 0.32em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    color: var(--violet);\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateY(14px);\n    transition: opacity 0.6s var(--ease) 0.2s, transform 0.7s var(--ease) 0.2s;\n  }\n  .future-headline {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 1;\n    text-align: center;\n    font-size: 152px;\n    line-height: 1.02;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: -0.035em;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    margin: 0;\n    max-width: 1500px;\n    text-wrap: balance;\n  }\n  .future-headline .line {\n    display: block;\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateY(28px);\n    transition: opacity 0.7s var(--ease), transform 0.85s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .future-headline .accent {\n    color: var(--violet);\n    position: relative;\n    display: inline-block;\n  }\n  .future-headline .accent::after {\n    content: \"\";\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 4%;\n    right: 4%;\n    bottom: -18px;\n    height: 6px;\n    background: var(--violet);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    transform-origin: left center;\n    transform: scaleX(0);\n    transition: transform 0.9s var(--ease) 0.6s;\n  }\n  .slide.fs-hero .future-headline .line:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.85s; }\n  .slide.fs-hero .future-headline .line:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 1.05s; }\n  .slide.fs-hero .future-headline .line { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n  .slide.fs-hero .future-headline .accent::after { transition-delay: 1.35s; transform: scaleX(1); }\n  .slide.fs-hero .future-eyebrow { transition-delay: 0.7s; opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n\n  /* In future mode dim everything below the layer */\n  .slide.future-mode .tl-chart,\n  .slide.future-mode .present-content {\n    opacity: 0;\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Stage: GRA FLOW ---------- */\n  .future-stage.gra-flow {\n    padding: 80px 100px 70px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 36px;\n  }\n  .fs-section-label {\n    font-size: 24px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: 0.28em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    color: var(--violet);\n  }\n  .fs-section-title {\n    font-size: 76px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    margin: 0;\n    line-height: 1.05;\n    text-wrap: balance;\n  }\n  .fs-section-sub {\n    font-size: 28px;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n    margin: 8px 0 0;\n    max-width: 900px;\n  }\n\n  /* GRA stepper — horizontal pipe with 6 icon nodes */\n  .gra-stepper {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    margin: 24px 0 8px;\n    padding: 0 24px;\n    position: relative;\n  }\n  .gra-stepper::before {\n    content: \"\";\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 38px;\n    left: 70px;\n    right: 70px;\n    height: 2px;\n    background: var(--hairline);\n    z-index: 0;\n  }\n  .gra-stepper::after {\n    content: \"\";\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 38px;\n    left: 70px;\n    height: 2px;\n    width: 0%;\n    background: var(--violet);\n    z-index: 1;\n    transition: width 4.5s linear;\n  }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-stepper::after { width: calc(100% - 140px); }\n\n  .gra-step {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 2;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 18px;\n    width: 140px;\n    text-align: center;\n  }\n  .gra-step .node {\n    width: 76px; height: 76px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    border: 2px solid var(--violet);\n    background: var(--paper);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    color: var(--violet);\n    transition: background 0.4s var(--ease), color 0.4s var(--ease), transform 0.5s var(--ease-pop);\n  }\n  .gra-step .node svg { width: 34px; height: 34px; }\n  .gra-step.is-active .node {\n    background: var(--violet);\n    color: #fff;\n    transform: scale(1.08);\n  }\n  .gra-step.is-done .node {\n    background: var(--violet);\n    color: #fff;\n  }\n  .gra-step .lbl {\n    font-size: 20px;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    line-height: 1.2;\n    text-wrap: balance;\n  }\n  .gra-step.is-active .lbl { color: var(--violet); }\n\n  /* GRA preview pane — the live form rendering below the stepper */\n  .gra-canvas {\n    flex: 1;\n    position: relative;\n    margin-top: 12px;\n    border-radius: 24px;\n    background: #F1ECF7;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    border: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    min-height: 0;\n  }\n  .gra-page {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 32px 40px;\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 380px;\n    gap: 28px;\n    opacity: 0;\n    transition: opacity 0.5s var(--ease);\n  }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-page { opacity: 1; }\n\n  .gra-form-col,\n  .gra-side-col {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 18px;\n    min-height: 0;\n  }\n  .gra-card {\n    background: #fff;\n    border-radius: 16px;\n    padding: 22px 26px;\n    box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--hairline) inset, 0 6px 18px -10px rgba(31,26,44,0.10);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 14px;\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: translateY(12px);\n    transition: opacity 0.5s var(--ease), transform 0.55s var(--ease-pop);\n  }\n  .gra-card .ch {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 14px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    font-size: 22px;\n  }\n  .gra-card .ch .ic {\n    width: 36px; height: 36px;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    background: var(--violet-100);\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    color: var(--violet);\n  }\n  .gra-card .ch .ic svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }\n  .gra-card .field {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 16px;\n    background: #F7F5FA;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    padding: 14px 18px;\n    font-size: 18px;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n  }\n  .gra-card .field .v {\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    font-weight: 500;\n  }\n  .gra-card .field.with-check::before {\n    content: \"\";\n    width: 22px; height: 22px;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    background: var(--violet);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n    background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 35%, #fff 35%, #fff 45%, transparent 45%, transparent 55%, #fff 55%, #fff 70%, transparent 70%);\n  }\n  .gra-card .row {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 12px;\n  }\n  .gra-card .row .bar {\n    flex: 1;\n    height: 8px;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    background: #EFEAF6;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    position: relative;\n  }\n  .gra-card .row .bar::after {\n    content: \"\";\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0;\n    width: 0%;\n    background: var(--violet);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    transition: width 1.2s var(--ease) var(--bar-delay, 0s);\n  }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-card .row .bar.full::after  { width: 100%; }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-card .row .bar.p70::after   { width: 70%;  }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-card .row .bar.p55::after   { width: 55%;  }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-card .row .bar.p35::after   { width: 35%;  }\n\n  /* Stagger cards in */\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-card { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-form-col .gra-card:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.25s; }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-form-col .gra-card:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.55s; }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-form-col .gra-card:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 0.85s; }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-side-col .gra-card:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.40s; }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-side-col .gra-card:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.70s; }\n  .slide.fs-gra-flow .gra-side-col .gra-card:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 1.00s; }\n\n  /* ---------- Stage: GRA DOC (finished document scrolling) ---------- */\n  .future-stage.gra-doc {\n    padding: 80px 100px 70px;\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: 1fr 880px;\n    gap: 80px;\n    align-items: center;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-narration {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 24px;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-bullets {\n    list-style: none;\n    padding: 0;\n    margin: 18px 0 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 14px;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-bullets li {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 14px;\n    font-size: 24px;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n  }\n  .gra-doc-bullets li::before {\n    content: \"\";\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n    margin-top: 11px;\n    width: 10px;\n    height: 10px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: var(--violet);\n  }\n\n  /* Document viewport (the “scrolling page”) */\n  .gra-doc-frame {\n    position: relative;\n    background: #fff;\n    border-radius: 22px;\n    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px -30px rgba(31,26,44,0.30), 0 0 0 1px var(--hairline);\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 820px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-frame::before,\n  .gra-doc-frame::after {\n    content: \"\";\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0; right: 0;\n    height: 60px;\n    z-index: 2;\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-frame::before { top: 0;    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fff 30%, transparent); }\n  .gra-doc-frame::after  { bottom: 0; background: linear-gradient(0deg,  #fff 30%, transparent); }\n  .gra-doc-scroll {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 0;\n    padding: 60px 64px;\n    transform: translateY(0);\n    transition: transform 9s linear;\n  }\n  .slide.fs-gra-doc .gra-doc-scroll { transform: translateY(-58%); }\n\n  .gra-doc-h1 {\n    font-size: 36px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    margin: 0 0 8px;\n    letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-sub {\n    font-size: 18px;\n    color: var(--ink-mute);\n    margin: 0 0 36px;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-section { margin: 0 0 28px; }\n  .gra-doc-section h3 {\n    font-size: 22px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: var(--violet);\n    margin: 0 0 12px;\n    letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-section p {\n    font-size: 17px;\n    line-height: 1.55;\n    color: var(--ink);\n    margin: 0 0 10px;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-row {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    padding: 11px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    font-size: 17px;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-row .k { color: var(--ink-soft); }\n  .gra-doc-row .v { color: var(--aubergine); font-weight: 600; }\n  .gra-doc-tag {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 6px;\n    padding: 4px 10px;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    background: var(--violet-100);\n    color: var(--violet);\n    font-size: 14px;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    margin-right: 6px;\n  }\n  .gra-doc-tag.warn { background: #FFE6CC; color: #B85C00; }\n  .gra-doc-tag.ok   { background: #D6F2E0; color: #11704A; }\n\n  /* ---------- Stage: OVERVIEW (What's new in 2.0) ----------\n     Top section header, then a 3-column feature card row (GRA,\n     e-learning, risk-tuning) above a full-width design-system card\n     that shows the Sentinel mascot in 5 different expressions plus\n     palette/type at a glance. */\n  .future-stage.overview {\n    padding: 80px 100px 70px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 32px;\n  }\n  .ov-grid {\n    flex: 1;\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-rows: minmax(0, 0.85fr) minmax(0, 1.15fr);\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);\n    gap: 22px;\n    min-height: 0;\n  }\n  .ov-card {\n    background: #fff;\n    border: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    border-radius: 22px;\n    padding: 28px 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 14px;\n    min-height: 0;\n    position: relative;\n    overflow: hidden;\n  }\n  .ov-card .ov-tag {\n    align-self: flex-start;\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 6px;\n    padding: 5px 11px;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    background: var(--violet-100);\n    color: var(--violet);\n    font-size: 12px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: 0.16em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n  }\n  .ov-card .ov-ic {\n    width: 64px;\n    height: 64px;\n    border-radius: 18px;\n    background: var(--violet-100);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    color: var(--violet);\n  }\n  .ov-card .ov-ic svg { width: 32px; height: 32px; }\n  .ov-card h3 {\n    font-size: 30px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: -0.015em;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    margin: 0;\n    line-height: 1.05;\n    text-wrap: balance;\n  }\n  .ov-card p {\n    font-size: 18px;\n    line-height: 1.4;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n    margin: 0;\n  }\n  .ov-card .ov-bullets {\n    list-style: none;\n    padding: 0;\n    margin: auto 0 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 5px;\n    font-size: 16px;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n  }\n  .ov-card .ov-bullets li {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 10px;\n  }\n  .ov-card .ov-bullets li::before {\n    content: \"\";\n    width: 7px; height: 7px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: var(--violet);\n  }\n\n  /* Design system card: full-width row with mascot variations strip\n     and a palette/type rail underneath. */\n  .ov-card.ov-design {\n    grid-column: 1 / -1;\n    background: linear-gradient(160deg, var(--violet-100) 0%, #fff 60%);\n    padding: 32px 40px;\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr;\n    gap: 40px;\n    align-items: center;\n  }\n  .ov-design-meta {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 14px;\n  }\n  .ov-design-meta h3 { font-size: 36px; }\n  .ov-design-meta p  { font-size: 19px; }\n  .ov-design-stack {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 22px;\n    min-width: 0;\n  }\n  .ov-mascots {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);\n    gap: 12px;\n  }\n  .ov-mascots .m-slot {\n    background: #fff;\n    border-radius: 16px;\n    padding: 14px 8px 10px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 10px;\n    box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--hairline) inset, 0 6px 18px -10px rgba(31,26,44,0.10);\n  }\n  .ov-mascots .m-slot svg {\n    width: 92px;\n    height: 92px;\n    display: block;\n  }\n  .ov-mascots .m-slot .lbl {\n    font-size: 11px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: 0.16em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    color: var(--ink-mute);\n  }\n  .ov-design-rail {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;\n    gap: 24px;\n    align-items: center;\n  }\n  .ov-design-rail .typo {\n    font-size: 56px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: -0.025em;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    line-height: 1;\n    padding-right: 24px;\n    border-right: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n  }\n  .ov-swatches {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);\n    gap: 8px;\n  }\n  .ov-swatches .sw {\n    aspect-ratio: 2.2 / 1;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    border: 1px solid rgba(31,26,44,0.06);\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Stage: DASHBOARD ---------- */\n  .future-stage.dashboard {\n    padding: 80px 100px 70px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 28px;\n  }\n  .dash-frame {\n    flex: 1;\n    background: #fff;\n    border-radius: 22px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px -30px rgba(31,26,44,0.30), 0 0 0 1px var(--hairline);\n    min-height: 0;\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;\n  }\n  .dash-img-wrap {\n    grid-column: 1 / -1;\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 100%;\n    background: #fff;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: stretch;\n    justify-content: center;\n  }\n  .dash-img-wrap img {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 100%;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    object-position: top center;\n    display: block;\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Stage: ROADMAP (when each feature ships) ---------- */\n  .future-stage.roadmap {\n    padding: 80px 100px 70px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 36px;\n  }\n  .roadmap-grid {\n    flex: 1;\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.15fr;\n    gap: 28px;\n    min-height: 0;\n  }\n  .roadmap-col {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 18px;\n    padding: 40px 44px;\n    border-radius: 22px;\n    border: 1px solid var(--hairline);\n    position: relative;\n    overflow: hidden;\n  }\n  .roadmap-col.now {\n    background: linear-gradient(160deg, #DEF5E3 0%, #fff 55%);\n    border-color: #B6E3C3;\n  }\n  .roadmap-col.later {\n    background: linear-gradient(160deg, var(--violet-100) 0%, #fff 60%);\n    border-color: var(--violet-300);\n  }\n  .roadmap-eyebrow {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 10px;\n    font-size: 16px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: 0.22em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    align-self: flex-start;\n    padding: 6px 14px;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);\n  }\n  .roadmap-col.now .roadmap-eyebrow { color: #11704A; }\n  .roadmap-col.later .roadmap-eyebrow { color: var(--violet); }\n  .roadmap-col h3 {\n    font-size: 42px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: -0.015em;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    margin: 4px 0 8px;\n    line-height: 1.05;\n  }\n  .roadmap-items {\n    list-style: none;\n    padding: 0;\n    margin: auto 0 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 18px;\n  }\n  .roadmap-item {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 18px;\n    padding: 16px 18px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n  }\n  .roadmap-col.now   .roadmap-item { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); }\n  .roadmap-col.later .roadmap-item { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }\n  .roadmap-item .ic {\n    width: 56px;\n    height: 56px;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n  }\n  .roadmap-col.now .roadmap-item .ic {\n    background: #B6E3C3;\n    color: #11704A;\n  }\n  .roadmap-col.later .roadmap-item .ic {\n    background: var(--violet-100);\n    color: var(--violet);\n  }\n  .roadmap-item .ic svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; }\n  .roadmap-item .text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }\n  .roadmap-item .name {\n    font-size: 26px;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    color: var(--aubergine);\n    letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n  }\n  .roadmap-item .meta {\n    font-size: 17px;\n    color: var(--ink-soft);\n  }\n\n  /* ---------- Stage: OUTRO ---------- */\n  .future-stage.outro {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    gap: 48px;\n    background: var(--aubergine);\n  }\n  .future-stage.outro::before {\n    content: \"\";\n    position: absolute;\n    width: 1200px; height: 1200px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: radial-gradient(circle, hsl(266 83% 65% / 0.35) 0%, transparent 65%);\n    z-index: 0;\n  }\n  .outro-mark {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 1;\n    font-size: 28px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: 0.34em;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    color: var(--violet-300);\n  }\n  .outro-text {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 1;\n    font-size: 96px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n    color: #fff;\n    text-align: center;\n    margin: 0;\n    text-wrap: balance;\n    max-width: 1400px;\n    line-height: 1.04;\n  }\n  .outro-tagline {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 1;\n    font-size: 30px;\n    color: var(--violet-300);\n    font-weight: 500;\n    margin: 0;\n  }\n\n  /* prefers-reduced-motion */\n  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {\n    *, *::before, *::after {\n      animation-duration: 0.001ms !important;\n      transition-duration: 0.001ms !important;\n    }\n  }\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<\u002Fhead>\n<body>\n\n\n\n<!-- ============================================================\n     Reusable SVG defs — mascot body. Each variation in the overview\n     references this and only redefines the eyes.\n     ============================================================ -->\n<svg style=\"position:absolute;width:0;height:0;overflow:hidden\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n  <defs>\n    <symbol id=\"mascot-body\" viewBox=\"0 0 166.6 158.2\">\n      <g shape-rendering=\"crispEdges\">\n        <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"0\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"142.8\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"119.0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"119.0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"119.0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"119.0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n        <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n      <\u002Fg>\n    <\u002Fsymbol>\n  <\u002Fdefs>\n<\u002Fsvg>\n\n<deck-stage width=\"1920\" height=\"1080\">\n\n  <section data-label=\"Nordkyc — Past, Present, Future\" class=\"slide\" data-phase=\"0\">\n\n    <!-- ============================================================\n         INTRO LAYER\n         ============================================================ -->\n    <div class=\"intro\">\n      <div class=\"intro-stack\">\n\n        <!-- Logo wordmark + mascot peek -->\n        <div class=\"intro-logo-wrap\">\n          <img class=\"wordmark\" src=\"61544870-5a6a-45a0-8a8b-75e0eae4e7de\" alt=\"Nordkyc\">\n\n          <!-- Mascot (Sentinel) — appears to the right of the wordmark with the \"Future\" word -->\n          <div class=\"intro-mascot-anchor\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n            <div class=\"intro-mascot\">\n            <svg viewBox=\"0 0 166.6 158.2\" shape-rendering=\"crispEdges\">\n              <g>\n                <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"23.8\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"47.6\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"0\" y=\"71.4\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"142.8\" y=\"95.2\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"23.8\" y=\"119.0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"47.6\" y=\"119.0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"95.2\" y=\"119.0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"119.0\" y=\"119.0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"71.4\" y=\"0\" width=\"23.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#8854D0\"><\u002Frect>\n                <!-- eyes -->\n                <rect x=\"57.9\" y=\"41.2\" width=\"9.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#0F0F12\"><\u002Frect>\n                <rect x=\"97.8\" y=\"41.2\" width=\"9.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#0F0F12\"><\u002Frect>\n              <\u002Fg>\n            <\u002Fsvg>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n\n        <!-- Past · Present · Future -->\n        <div class=\"intro-tagline\">\n          <span class=\"word past\">Past<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"word sep sep1\">·<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"word present\">Present<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"word sep sep2\">·<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"word future\">Future<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- (no click-to-begin hint — slide is visually clean) -->\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <!-- ============================================================\n         TIMELINE LAYER\n         ============================================================ -->\n    <div class=\"tl-layer\">\n\n      <header class=\"tl-header\">\n        <div class=\"tl-wordmark\">\n          <img class=\"tl-wm\" src=\"61544870-5a6a-45a0-8a8b-75e0eae4e7de\" alt=\"Nordkyc\">\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"tl-eyebrow\">\n          <span class=\"word-past\">Past<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"sep\">·<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"word-present\">Present<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"sep\">·<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"word-future\">Future<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fheader>\n\n      <!-- Partners & integrations strip\n           Chips fade in as their milestone phase is reached. -->\n      <div class=\"tl-partners\">\n        <span class=\"label\">Partners<small>&amp; integrations<\u002Fsmall><\u002Fspan>\n        <div class=\"chips\">\n          <div class=\"partner-chip\" data-partner-from=\"2\" data-kind=\"partner\" title=\"Mäklarsamfundet — Partner (Feb 2022)\">\n            <img src=\"08cdf72a-cbde-4eee-8f9b-defc2364450a\" alt=\"Mäklarsamfundet\">\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n          <div class=\"partner-chip\" data-partner-from=\"4\" data-kind=\"integration\" title=\"Vitec — Integration (Feb 2023)\">\n            <img src=\"ddc223d3-1539-4c26-bffa-3a84e2a4bb6a\" alt=\"Vitec\">\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n          <div class=\"partner-chip\" data-partner-from=\"5\" data-kind=\"integration\" title=\"MSpecs — Integration (May 2023)\">\n            <img src=\"105ed75d-e3c1-4a37-8b85-468eaf4ecc46\" alt=\"MSpecs\">\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n          <div class=\"partner-chip\" data-partner-from=\"6\" data-kind=\"partner\" title=\"SRF — Partner (Jan 2024)\">\n            <img src=\"2bfb2f12-9baa-49cf-a376-eeb257d5fdac\" alt=\"SRF Partner\">\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n          <div class=\"partner-chip\" data-partner-from=\"9\" data-kind=\"integration\" title=\"Fasad — Integration (May 2026)\">\n            <img src=\"c5c0d4fb-f763-4eef-bf8a-d371a3abcb94\" alt=\"Fasad\">\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- KPI strip — values update per phase via JS -->\n      <div class=\"tl-kpis\">\n        <div class=\"kpi\">\n          <span class=\"num\" data-kpi=\"customers\">1<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"lbl\">Customers onboarded<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"kpi\">\n          <span class=\"num\" data-kpi=\"kyc\">50<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"lbl\">KYC checks completed<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"kpi\">\n          <span class=\"num\" data-kpi=\"partnerships\">0<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"lbl\">Integrations &amp; partnerships<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- Chart -->\n      <div class=\"tl-chart\">\n\n        <!-- Plot area: curve + milestones -->\n        <div class=\"tl-plot\">\n\n        <!-- Cumulative KYC curve in background -->\n        <svg class=\"tl-curve\" viewBox=\"0 0 1000 400\" preserveAspectRatio=\"none\">\n          <defs>\n            <linearGradient id=\"curveGrad\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"1\">\n              <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"rgba(136,84,208,0.45)\"><\u002Fstop>\n              <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"rgba(136,84,208,0.02)\"><\u002Fstop>\n            <\u002FlinearGradient>\n            <clipPath id=\"reveal\" clipPathUnits=\"userSpaceOnUse\">\n              <rect class=\"reveal-rect\" x=\"0\" y=\"-10\" width=\"0\" height=\"420\"><\u002Frect>\n            <\u002FclipPath>\n          <\u002Fdefs>\n\n          <!-- Background (faint): full curve -->\n          <path class=\"curve-bg\" d=\"\n            M 0,400\n            L 50,400\n            L 85,397\n            L 170,393\n            L 271,378\n            L 288,374\n            L 339,348\n            L 390,310\n            L 440,272\n            L 475,258\n            L 560,210\n            L 640,160\n            L 695,128\n            L 760,90\n            L 830,40\n            L 932,8\n            L 949,0\n            L 1000,0\n            L 1000,400 Z\n          \"><\u002Fpath>\n\n          <!-- Foreground (violet): same curve, revealed via clip -->\n          <g clip-path=\"url(#reveal)\">\n            <path class=\"curve-fg-fill\" d=\"\n              M 0,400\n              L 50,400\n              L 85,397\n              L 170,393\n              L 271,378\n              L 288,374\n              L 339,348\n              L 390,310\n              L 440,272\n              L 475,258\n              L 560,210\n              L 640,160\n              L 695,128\n              L 760,90\n              L 830,40\n              L 932,8\n              L 949,0\n              L 1000,0\n              L 1000,400 Z\n            \"><\u002Fpath>\n            <path class=\"curve-fg-stroke\" d=\"\n              M 0,400\n              L 50,400\n              L 85,397\n              L 170,393\n              L 271,378\n              L 288,374\n              L 339,348\n              L 390,310\n              L 440,272\n              L 475,258\n              L 560,210\n              L 640,160\n              L 695,128\n              L 760,90\n              L 830,40\n              L 932,8\n              L 949,0\n              L 1000,0\n            \"><\u002Fpath>\n          <\u002Fg>\n        <\u002Fsvg>\n\n        <!-- Milestones -->\n        <div class=\"milestones\">\n\n          <!-- 1. Dec 2021 — First customer onboarded -->\n          <div class=\"ms flip-right\" data-i=\"1\" data-cust=\"1\" data-kyc=\"50\" data-part=\"0\" style=\"--x: 5;    --y: 100\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">December 2021<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">First customer onboarded<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- 2. Feb 2022 — Mäklarsamfundet -->\n          <div class=\"ms flip-right\" data-i=\"2\" data-cust=\"15\" data-kyc=\"1500\" data-part=\"1\" style=\"--x: 8.5;  --y: 99\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">February 2022<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">Partnership with Mäklarsamfundet<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- 3. Jan 2023 — GRA consulting services first offered -->\n          <div class=\"ms\" data-i=\"3\" data-cust=\"90\" data-kyc=\"20000\" data-part=\"1\" style=\"--x: 27.1; --y: 95\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">January 2023<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">GRA consulting services first offered<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- 4. Feb 2023 — Vitec -->\n          <div class=\"ms\" data-i=\"4\" data-cust=\"110\" data-kyc=\"25000\" data-part=\"2\" style=\"--x: 28.8; --y: 94\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">February 2023<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">Integration with Vitec<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- 5. May 2023 — MSpecs (volume begins accelerating) -->\n          <div class=\"ms\" data-i=\"5\" data-cust=\"170\" data-kyc=\"50000\" data-part=\"3\" style=\"--x: 33.9; --y: 88\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">May 2023<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">Integration with MSpecs<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-note\">KYC volume begins accelerating<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- 6. Jan 2024 — SRF (volume past 100k by end of 2023) -->\n          <div class=\"ms\" data-i=\"6\" data-cust=\"320\" data-kyc=\"135000\" data-part=\"4\" style=\"--x: 47.5; --y: 66\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">January 2024<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">Partnership with SRF<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- 7. Feb 2025 — 600 customers -->\n          <div class=\"ms\" data-i=\"7\" data-cust=\"600\" data-kyc=\"275000\" data-part=\"4\" style=\"--x: 69.5; --y: 31\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">February 2025<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">600 customers onboarded<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- 8. Apr 2026 — GRA soft launch -->\n          <div class=\"ms flip-left flip-down\" data-i=\"8\" data-cust=\"680\" data-kyc=\"385000\" data-part=\"4\" style=\"--x: 93.2; --y: 4\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">April 2026<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">GRA soft launch<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-note\">General Risk Assessment in the product<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- 9. May 2026 — Fasad + 700 customers -->\n          <div class=\"ms flip-left flip-down\" data-i=\"9\" data-cust=\"700\" data-kyc=\"400000\" data-part=\"5\" style=\"--x: 94.9; --y: 0\">\n            <div class=\"popup\">\n              <span class=\"popup-month\">May 2026<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-title\">Integration with Fasad<\u002Fspan>\n              <span class=\"popup-note\">700 customers onboarded<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"stem\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"dot\"><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n\n        <!-- Year labels (below the timeline line) -->\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"tl-years\">\n          <span>2022<\u002Fspan>\n          <span>2023<\u002Fspan>\n          <span>2024<\u002Fspan>\n          <span>2025<\u002Fspan>\n          <span>2026<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- Present-stage content: card + outro bridging into Future.\n           Sits in the same grid cell as .tl-chart and reveals as the chart\n           fades. -->\n      <div class=\"present-content\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n        <div class=\"present-card\">\n          <p>Today we are <strong>Sweden’s leading KYC tool for the real-estate industry<\u002Fstrong> — and we continue to see strong growth.<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"present-outro\">But we’re not stopping here.<\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- (footer removed) -->\n\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <!-- ============================================================\n         FUTURE LAYER — phase 13 onward\n         Hosts 6 crossfading stages: hero, GRA flow, GRA doc, design\n         system grid, dashboard preview, outro.\n         ============================================================ -->\n    <div class=\"future-layer\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n\n      <!-- Stage 13: Hero — mascot jumps in, then “Introducing Nordkyc 2.0” -->\n      <div class=\"future-stage hero\">\n        <div class=\"hero-mascot\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 166.6 158.2\" shape-rendering=\"crispEdges\">\n            <use href=\"#mascot-body\"><\u002Fuse>\n            <rect x=\"57.9\" y=\"41.2\" width=\"9.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#0F0F12\"><\u002Frect>\n            <rect x=\"97.8\" y=\"41.2\" width=\"9.8\" height=\"23.8\" fill=\"#0F0F12\"><\u002Frect>\n          <\u002Fsvg>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"future-eyebrow\">The next chapter<\u002Fdiv>\n        <h1 class=\"future-headline\">\n          <span class=\"line\">Introducing<\u002Fspan>\n          <span class=\"line\"><span class=\"accent\">Nordkyc 2.0<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fh1>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- Stage 14: Overview — What's new in 2.0 -->\n      <div class=\"future-stage overview\">\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"fs-section-label\">What's new in 2.0<\u002Fdiv>\n          <h2 class=\"fs-section-title\">Built on what works — stretched in every direction.<\u002Fh2>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"ov-grid\">\n          <!-- Feature: GRA -->\n          <div class=\"ov-card\">\n            <div class=\"ov-ic\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M3 17l6-6 4 4 8-9\"><\u002Fpath><path d=\"M14 6h7v7\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3>General Risk Assessment<\u002Fh3>\n            <p>A guided six-step flow that turns a business profile into a complete, audit-ready risk document.<\u002Fp>\n            <ul class=\"ov-bullets\">\n              <li>Stepper-driven UX<\u002Fli>\n              <li>Auto-generated documentation<\u002Fli>\n              <li>Versioned &amp; signed<\u002Fli>\n            <\u002Ful>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- Feature: E-learning -->\n          <div class=\"ov-card\">\n            <div class=\"ov-ic\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M2 8l10-5 10 5-10 5z\"><\u002Fpath><path d=\"M6 10v6c3 2 9 2 12 0v-6\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3>E-learning<\u002Fh3>\n            <p>AML training and certification built into the product — short modules, quizzes, and team-level progress.<\u002Fp>\n            <ul class=\"ov-bullets\">\n              <li>Bite-sized AML modules<\u002Fli>\n              <li>Built-in quizzes<\u002Fli>\n              <li>Team tracking<\u002Fli>\n            <\u002Ful>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- Feature: Risk-tuning -->\n          <div class=\"ov-card\">\n            <div class=\"ov-ic\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M4 6h11M19 6h1M4 12h5M13 12h7M4 18h13M21 18h-1\"><\u002Fpath><circle cx=\"17\" cy=\"6\" r=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle><circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"12\" r=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle><circle cx=\"19\" cy=\"18\" r=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3>Risk-tuning<\u002Fh3>\n            <p>Calibrate the model to your business. Adjust weights, override factors, lock the rationale to your policy.<\u002Fp>\n            <ul class=\"ov-bullets\">\n              <li>Per-factor weights<\u002Fli>\n              <li>Policy-anchored overrides<\u002Fli>\n              <li>Auditable trail<\u002Fli>\n            <\u002Ful>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- Feature: Reworked KYC flow -->\n          <div class=\"ov-card\">\n            <div class=\"ov-ic\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"8\" r=\"4\"><\u002Fcircle><path d=\"M4 21c0-4 4-7 8-7s8 3 8 7\"><\u002Fpath><path d=\"M15.5 11l1.5 1.5L20 9.5\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3>Reworked KYC flow<\u002Fh3>\n            <p>Rebuilt from the ground up — guided, adaptive, and tuned to each customer's risk profile end to end.<\u002Fp>\n            <ul class=\"ov-bullets\">\n              <li>Adaptive to customer type<\u002Fli>\n              <li>Lower-friction onboarding<\u002Fli>\n              <li>Aligned with risk-tuning<\u002Fli>\n            <\u002Ful>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <!-- Feature: refreshed design system, full-width with mascot strip -->\n          <div class=\"ov-card ov-design\">\n            <div class=\"ov-design-meta\">\n              <span class=\"ov-tag\">Design<\u002Fspan>\n              <h3>A refreshed design system<\u002Fh3>\n              <p>Same calm, focused feel — sharper edges, clearer rhythm, and Sentinel in every
