21v-7h6v7\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fspan> Kundtyper<\u002Fdiv>\n                <div class=\"field with-check\"><span class=\"v\">Fysisk person — 100%<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- Stage 16: GRA finished document -->\n      <div class=\"future-stage gra-doc\">\n        <div class=\"gra-doc-narration\">\n          <div class=\"fs-section-label\">The output<\u002Fdiv>\n          <h2 class=\"fs-section-title\">A complete risk assessment, ready in minutes.<\u002Fh2>\n          <p class=\"fs-section-sub\">From input to published document — fully traceable, audit-ready, and tailored to each business.<\u002Fp>\n          <ul class=\"gra-doc-bullets\">\n            <li>Auto-generated from your inputs<\u002Fli>\n            <li>Risk factors, controls and rationale in one place<\u002Fli>\n            <li>Versioned and shareable with your team<\u002Fli>\n          <\u002Ful>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"gra-doc-frame\">\n          <div class=\"gra-doc-scroll\">\n            <div class=\"gra-doc-h1\">Allmän riskbedömning<\u002Fdiv>\n            <div class=\"gra-doc-sub\">Nordkyc AB · Org.nr 559317-6307 · Period: 12 månader · Version 2<\u002Fdiv>\n\n            <div class=\"gra-doc-section\">\n              <h3>1. Verksamhetsprofil<\u002Fh3>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">Företagsstorlek<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Mellanstor (6–20 mäklare)<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">Geografisk spridning<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Inom kommunen<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">Tjänster<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Förmedling 11% · Skrivuppdrag 89%<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">Objekttyper<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Bostadsrätt 100%<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">Kundtyp<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Fysisk person 100%<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n\n            <div class=\"gra-doc-section\">\n              <h3>2. Geografisk exponering<\u002Fh3>\n              <p>Verksamheten har sin huvudsakliga exponering mot Sverige (100%). Inga affärer rapporteras mot utsatta områden eller tredjeland.<\u002Fp>\n              <div><span class=\"gra-doc-tag ok\">Låg<\u002Fspan><span>Sverige (SE) · Andel 100%<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n\n            <div class=\"gra-doc-section\">\n              <h3>3. Signaler &amp; Händelser<\u002Fh3>\n              <p>Inga signaler bekräftade under perioden. Modellen tar hänsyn till högre andel “engångskunder” och affärer utan svenskt bankbolån.<\u002Fp>\n              <div>\n                <span class=\"gra-doc-tag warn\">Medel<\u002Fspan>\n                <span class=\"gra-doc-tag\">Engångskunder 76–100%<\u002Fspan>\n                <span class=\"gra-doc-tag\">Privat finansiering 0%<\u002Fspan>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n\n            <div class=\"gra-doc-section\">\n              <h3>4. Riskfaktorer<\u002Fh3>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">T1 · Väsentlig prisavvikelse<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Bekräftad<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">T2 · Objekt med tvist/utmätning<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Bekräftad<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">T6 · Sale-and-leaseback<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Bekräftad<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">T7 · Kryptobetalning<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Bekräftad<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">T8 · Structuring<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">Bekräftad<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n\n            <div class=\"gra-doc-section\">\n              <h3>5. Kontroller<\u002Fh3>\n              <p>Kompensatoriska kontroller är på plats: dual approval vid högrisk, oberoende QA-stickprov, krav på dokumenterad riskmotivering.<\u002Fp>\n              <div>\n                <span class=\"gra-doc-tag ok\">Dual approval<\u002Fspan>\n                <span class=\"gra-doc-tag ok\">QA stickprov<\u002Fspan>\n                <span class=\"gra-doc-tag ok\">Dokumenterad motivering<\u002Fspan>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n\n            <div class=\"gra-doc-section\">\n              <h3>6. Sammanfattning<\u002Fh3>\n              <p>Verksamhetens sammantagna risknivå bedöms som <strong style=\"color:var(--violet)\">Medel<\u002Fstrong>. Dokumentet uppdateras automatiskt vid nästa period.<\u002Fp>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">Risk · Låg<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">78%<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">Risk · Medel<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">18%<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <div class=\"gra-doc-row\"><span class=\"k\">Risk · Hög<\u002Fspan><span class=\"v\">4%<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- Stage 17: Dashboard preview -->\n      <div class=\"future-stage dashboard\">\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"fs-section-label\">Your new home<\u002Fdiv>\n          <h2 class=\"fs-section-title\">An overview that earns its name.<\u002Fh2>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"dash-frame\">\n          <div class=\"dash-img-wrap\">\n            <img src=\"a842835a-1ff4-48f4-ab58-549d094abb13\" alt=\"Nordkyc 2.0 dashboard preview\">\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- Stage 18: Roadmap — release timing -->\n      <div class=\"future-stage roadmap\">\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"fs-section-label\">The roadmap<\u002Fdiv>\n          <h2 class=\"fs-section-title\">What's shipping, when.<\u002Fh2>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"roadmap-grid\">\n          <div class=\"roadmap-col now\">\n            <div class=\"roadmap-eyebrow\">\n              <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"3\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M5 12l5 5L20 6\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg>\n              Available now\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3>Already in your hands.<\u002Fh3>\n            <ul class=\"roadmap-items\">\n              <li class=\"roadmap-item\">\n                <div class=\"ic\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M3 17l6-6 4 4 8-9\"><\u002Fpath><path d=\"M14 6h7v7\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n                <div class=\"text\">\n                  <div class=\"name\">General Risk Assessment<\u002Fdiv>\n                  <div class=\"meta\">In soft launch with selected customers — finalising before full release.<\u002Fdiv>\n                <\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fli>\n            <\u002Ful>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n\n          <div class=\"roadmap-col later\">\n            <div class=\"roadmap-eyebrow\">\n              <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.4\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"9\"><\u002Fcircle><path d=\"M12 7v5l3 2\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg>\n              Later this year\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3>Coming up next.<\u002Fh3>\n            <ul class=\"roadmap-items\">\n              <li class=\"roadmap-item\">\n                <div class=\"ic\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"8\" r=\"4\"><\u002Fcircle><path d=\"M4 21c0-4 4-7 8-7s8 3 8 7\"><\u002Fpath><path d=\"M15.5 11l1.5 1.5L20 9.5\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n                <div class=\"text\">\n                  <div class=\"name\">Reworked KYC flow<\u002Fdiv>\n                  <div class=\"meta\">Adaptive, lower-friction onboarding.<\u002Fdiv>\n                <\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fli>\n              <li class=\"roadmap-item\">\n                <div class=\"ic\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M2 8l10-5 10 5-10 5z\"><\u002Fpath><path d=\"M6 10v6c3 2 9 2 12 0v-6\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n                <div class=\"text\">\n                  <div class=\"name\">E-learning<\u002Fdiv>\n                  <div class=\"meta\">Bite-sized AML training, in-product.<\u002Fdiv>\n                <\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fli>\n              <li class=\"roadmap-item\">\n                <div class=\"ic\"><svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M4 6h11M19 6h1M4 12h5M13 12h7M4 18h13M21 18h-1\"><\u002Fpath><circle cx=\"17\" cy=\"6\" r=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle><circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"12\" r=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle><circle cx=\"19\" cy=\"18\" r=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n                <div class=\"text\">\n                  <div class=\"name\">Risk-tuning<\u002Fdiv>\n                  <div class=\"meta\">Calibrate the model to your business.<\u002Fdiv>\n                <\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fli>\n            <\u002Ful>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <!-- Stage 19: Outro fade -->\n      <div class=\"future-stage outro\">\n        <div class=\"outro-mark\">Nordkyc 2.0<\u002Fdiv>\n        <h2 class=\"outro-text\">The next chapter of trust in real estate.<\u002Fh2>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <\u002Fsection>\n\n<\u002Fdeck-stage>\n\n<script src=\"9b0bcf51-5e5a-48ae-a692-6153b7a33dc1\"><\u002Fscript>\n<script>\n  /* =====================================================================\n     PHASE STATE MACHINE  +  WAAPI-driven intro animation\n     =====================================================================\n     Intro (phase 0): four internal steps, each advanced by a click\n       step 0 → logo only\n       step 1 → + \"Past\"\n       step 2 → + \"Present\"\n       step 3 → + \"Future\" + mascot\n     Phase 1..9       → timeline with active milestone N\n     Click advances:\n       Intro: step up (or move to phase 1 when intro complete)\n       Timeline: advance active milestone by 1\n     ===================================================================== */\n\n  const slide = document.querySelector('.slide');\n  const milestones = [...document.querySelectorAll('.ms')];\n  // Phases: 0 = intro, 1..9 = milestones, 10..12 = Present,\n  // 13 = Hero (mascot jumps + Introducing Nordkyc 2.0),\n  // 14 = Overview of what's new,\n  // 15 = GRA flow stepper, 16 = GRA finished document,\n  // 17 = Dashboard preview,\n  // 18 = Release roadmap (now / later this year),\n  // 19 = Outro fade.\n  const TOTAL_PHASES = 19;\n\n  const EASE     = 'cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1)';\n  const EASE_POP = 'cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)';\n\n  let phase = 0;\n  let introStep = 0;            // 0..3 (within intro phase 0)\n\n  // Each intro step reveals these selectors\n  const INTRO_STEPS = [\n    // step 0: logo only\n    [{ sel: '.intro-logo-wrap', kind: 'fade-up' }],\n    // step 1: + \"Past\"\n    [\n      { sel: '.intro-tagline .word.past', kind: 'fade-up' },\n      { sel: '.intro-tagline .word.sep1', kind: 'fade-up' },\n    ],\n    // step 2: + \"Present\"\n    [\n      { sel: '.intro-tagline .word.present', kind: 'fade-up' },\n      { sel: '.intro-tagline .word.sep2',    kind: 'fade-up' },\n    ],\n    // step 3: + \"Future\" + mascot\n    [\n      { sel: '.intro-tagline .word.future', kind: 'fade-up' },\n      { sel: '.intro-mascot',                kind: 'mascot' },\n    ],\n  ];\n\n  /* ---- Animation primitives (Web Animations API) ---- */\n  function animateFadeUp(el) {\n    el.getAnimations().forEach(a => a.cancel());\n    el.animate(\n      [\n        { opacity: 0, transform: 'translateY(10px)' },\n        { opacity: 1, transform: 'translateY(0)' },\n      ],\n      { duration: 500, easing: EASE, fill: 'forwards' }\n    );\n  }\n\n  function animateMascot(el) {\n    el.getAnimations().forEach(a => a.cancel());\n    // Peek out from behind the c letter (one-time pop-in)\n    const pop = el.animate(\n      [\n        { opacity: 0, transform: 'translateY(103px)' },\n        { opacity: 1, transform: 'translateY(-15px)' },\n      ],\n      { duration: 700, easing: EASE_POP, fill: 'forwards' }\n    );\n    pop.onfinish = () => {\n      // Subtle continuous bob (stays peeked, just gently floats — the mascot\n      // is \"watching from behind\", not playing peek-a-boo).\n      // Bobs entirely ABOVE the clip line so the legs never poke through.\n      el.animate(\n        [\n          { transform: 'translateY(-15px)' },\n          { transform: 'translateY(-19px)' },\n          { transform: 'translateY(-15px)' },\n        ],\n        { duration: 2400, iterations: Infinity, easing: 'ease-in-out' }\n      );\n    };\n  }\n\n  function runStep(step) {\n    const el = document.querySelector(step.sel);\n    if (!el) return;\n    if (step.kind === 'mascot') animateMascot(el);\n    else                        animateFadeUp(el);\n  }\n\n  /* ---- Intro orchestration ---- */\n  function resetIntroElements() {\n    INTRO_STEPS.flat().forEach(step => {\n      const el = document.querySelector(step.sel);\n      if (!el) return;\n      el.getAnimations().forEach(a => a.cancel());\n      // The element's CSS rule re-applies opacity:0 once animations are cancelled.\n    });\n  }\n\n  function showIntroStep(step) {\n    if (!INTRO_STEPS[step]) return;\n    INTRO_STEPS[step].forEach(runStep);\n  }\n\n  function startIntro() {\n    introStep = 0;\n    resetIntroElements();\n    // Give the browser a frame so the cancelled animations settle to their\n    // initial CSS state before we start the new ones.\n    requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {\n      showIntroStep(0);\n    }));\n  }\n\n  /* ---- Phase application (timeline state) ---- */\n  function applyPhase() {\n    slide.setAttribute('data-phase', phase);\n\n    // Highlight the active section in the Past · Present · Future eyebrow\n    slide.classList.remove('eb-past', 'eb-present', 'eb-future');\n    if (phase >= 1 && phase <= 9) slide.classList.add('eb-past');\n    else if (phase >= 10 && phase <= 12) slide.classList.add('eb-present');\n    else if (phase >= 13)         slide.classList.add('eb-future');\n\n    // Present-stage toggles\n    slide.classList.toggle('present-mode',        phase >= 10 && phase <= 12);\n    slide.classList.toggle('present-card-shown',  phase >= 11 && phase <= 12);\n    slide.classList.toggle('present-outro-shown', phase >= 12 && phase <= 12);\n\n    // Future-stage toggle\n    slide.classList.toggle('future-mode',         phase >= 13);\n    // Sub-stage selector\n    slide.classList.toggle('fs-hero',      phase === 13);\n    slide.classList.toggle('fs-overview',  phase === 14);\n    slide.classList.toggle('fs-gra-flow',  phase === 15);\n    slide.classList.toggle('fs-gra-doc',   phase === 16);\n    slide.classList.toggle('fs-dashboard', phase === 17);\n    slide.classList.toggle('fs-roadmap',   phase === 18);\n    slide.classList.toggle('fs-outro',     phase === 19);\n\n    // Partners / integrations chips\n    document.querySelectorAll('.partner-chip').forEach(chip => {\n      const from = parseInt(chip.dataset.partnerFrom, 10);\n      chip.classList.toggle('shown', phase >= from);\n      chip.classList.toggle('is-new', phase === from);\n    });\n\n    milestones.forEach(m => {\n      const i = parseInt(m.dataset.i, 10);\n      m.classList.remove('done', 'active');\n      if (phase >= 10) {\n        // Present stage: all milestones shown as completed (no active halo)\n        m.classList.add('done');\n      } else if (phase >= i) {\n        if (i === phase) m.classList.add('active');\n        else m.classList.add('done');\n      }\n    });\n\n    const rect = document.querySelector('.reveal-rect');\n    if (phase === 0) {\n      rect.setAttribute('width', '0');\n    } else if (phase <= 9) {\n      const active = milestones[phase - 1];\n      const xPct = parseFloat(active.style.getPropertyValue('--x'));\n      rect.setAttribute('width', Math.max(0, xPct * 10));\n    } else {\n      // Present/Future phases: keep curve fully revealed\n      rect.setAttribute('width', '1000');\n    }\n\n    if (phase === 0) {\n      setKPI('customers', 0);\n      setKPI('kyc', 0);\n      setKPI('partnerships', 0);\n    } else if (phase <= 9) {\n      const active = milestones[phase - 1];\n      setKPI('customers',    parseInt(active.dataset.cust, 10));\n      setKPI('kyc',          parseInt(active.dataset.kyc,  10));\n      setKPI('partnerships', parseInt(active.dataset.part, 10));\n    } else {\n      // Present / Future: lock to current totals\n      const last = milestones[milestones.length - 1];\n      setKPI('customers',    parseInt(last.dataset.cust, 10));\n      setKPI('kyc',          parseInt(last.dataset.kyc,  10));\n      setKPI('partnerships', parseInt(last.dataset.part, 10));\n    }\n  }\n\n  /* ---- KPI count-up ---- */\n  const prevKPI = { customers: 0, kyc: 0, partnerships: 0 };\n  function setKPI(key, target) {\n    const el = document.querySelector('[data-kpi=\"' + key + '\"]');\n    if (!el) return;\n    const from = prevKPI[key] || 0;\n    prevKPI[key] = target;\n    const dur = 700;\n    const start = performance.now();\n    function step(now) {\n      const t = Math.min(1, (now - start) / dur);\n      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3);\n      const v = from + (target - from) * eased;\n      el.textContent = fmt(key, v);\n      if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);\n      else el.textContent = fmt(key, target);\n    }\n    requestAnimationFrame(step);\n  }\n  function fmt(key, v) {\n    const n = Math.round(v);\n    if (key === 'kyc' && n >= 400000) return '400 000+';\n    if (key === 'customers' && n >= 700) return n + '+';\n    return n.toString().replace(/\\B(?=(\\d{3})+(?!\\d))/g, ' ');\n  }\n\n  /* ---- Click handler ---- */\n  function advance() {\n    if (phase === 0) {\n      // Step through the intro one click at a time\n      if (introStep < INTRO_STEPS.length - 1) {\n        introStep += 1;\n        showIntroStep(introStep);\n        return;\n      }\n      // Intro complete → move to timeline phase 1\n      phase = 1;\n      applyPhase();\n      return;\n    }\n    if (phase < TOTAL_PHASES) {\n      phase += 1;\n      applyPhase();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function goBack() {\n    if (phase > 1) { phase -= 1; applyPhase(); return; }\n    if (phase === 1) { phase = 0; applyPhase(); return; }\n    // Inside intro: step back if possible\n    if (introStep > 0) {\n      // To \"un-reveal\" a step we cancel its animations and hide the elements\n      INTRO_STEPS[introStep].forEach(step => {\n        const el = document.querySelector(step.sel);\n        if (!el) return;\n        el.getAnimations().forEach(a => a.cancel());\n      });\n      introStep -= 1;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function restart() {\n    phase = 0;\n    introStep = 0;\n    prevKPI.customers = 0; prevKPI.kyc = 0; prevKPI.partnerships = 0;\n    slide.setAttribute('data-phase', 0);\n    milestones.forEach(m => m.classList.remove('done','active'));\n    document.querySelector('.reveal-rect').setAttribute('width', '0');\n    setKPI('customers', 0);\n    setKPI('kyc', 0);\n    setKPI('partnerships', 0);\n    startIntro();\n  }\n\n  // No restart button — keyboard 'r' shortcut still triggers restart.\n\n  slide.addEventListener('click', () => { advance(); });\n\n  // Keyboard support: right arrow / space advances, left arrow goes back\n  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n    if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); advance(); }\n    if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      goBack();\n    }\n    if (e.key === 'r' || e.key === 'R') { restart(); }\n  });\n\n  /* Measure the natural top of the partners strip, then compute the\n     exact translateY needed to pin its bottom edge ~50px above the\n     slide bottom (1080px). The result is exposed as --partners-y so\n     the CSS transition can animate to it. */\n  function calibratePartnersDelta() {\n    const partners = document.querySelector('.tl-partners');\n    if (!partners) return;\n    const wasPresent = slide.classList.contains('present-mode');\n    slide.classList.remove('present-mode');\n    // force layout\n    void partners.offsetHeight;\n    const naturalTop = partners.offsetTop;\n    const naturalH   = partners.offsetHeight;\n    const SLIDE_H    = 1080;\n    const GAP_BOTTOM = 50;\n    const targetTop  = SLIDE_H - GAP_BOTTOM - naturalH;\n    const delta = Math.max(0, targetTop - naturalTop);\n    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--partners-y', delta + 'px');\n    if (wasPresent) slide.classList.add('present-mode');\n  }\n\n  window.addEventListener('resize', () => calibratePartnersDelta());\n\n  window.addEventListener('load', () => {\n    calibratePartnersDelta();\n    applyPhase();\n    // Defer the intro start by 2 animation frames so the initial CSS state\n    // is fully painted before we trigger opacity transitions on the words.\n    // Without this, the first transition can silently fail (the browser\n    // skips it because no prior computed value was committed).\n    requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(startIntro));\n  });\n<\u002Fscript>\n\n\n\n<\u002Fbody><\u002Fhtml>"
  </script>
</body>
</html>
